codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit bc45d76 for the Settings demo-scope localization follow-up. The change stays within the feature contract by routing remaining first-screen provider/integrations/notifications helper copy through the shared locale catalog, adding both zh/en entries, and extending the focused Settings regression test to cover the newly localized strings and guard against reintroducing hard-coded covered-surface English copy.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker reused the earlier settings-browser-verification-pass and skipped a fresh browser session for this narrow string-key cleanup, marking the frontend-i18n-worker procedure as not fully followed. That deviation appears justified because this commit only touched covered helper strings and test coverage, and the mission already has a dedicated browser verification feature for the same surface.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff skillFeedback for session 4dd378dd-3e7a-48aa-a6c2-130dc9489070 notes a deviation from manual browser verification; features.json includes completed feature settings-browser-verification-pass for the Settings surface.

summary: Pass. The reviewed Settings localization follow-up is scoped correctly, satisfies the covered first-screen contract, and does not show a correctness regression in the inspected diff or supporting test coverage.
